parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.CLAUDE_MODEL || 'claude-sonnet-4-6-20250929', max_tokens: 1500, system: 'You are Griffin Gold AI, the social media voice of Griffin Gold — an AI-powered Gold prediction platform (@GriffinGoldBot on Telegram). Data-driven, educational, transparent about accuracy. Never financial advice. For LinkedIn: professional, thought-leadership tone.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ author: 'urn:li:person:' + $env.LINKEDIN_PERSON_URN, lifecycleState: 'PUBLISHED', specificContent: { 'com.linkedin.ugc.ShareContent': { shareCommentary: { text: $json.text }, shareMediaCategory: 'NONE' } }, visibility: { 'com.linkedin.ugc.MemberNetworkVisibility': 'PUBLIC' } }) }}
